title: Heroes' Quest

startPoint.en: Talk to Achietties at the entrance to the Heroes' Guild in Burthorpe.
startPoint.es: Habla con Achietties en la entrada del Heroes' Guild en Burthorpe.

items.name: Ice gloves
items.display: Ice gloves (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Fishing rod
items.display: Fishing rod (can be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Fishing bait
items.display: Fishing bait if baitless fishing is not unlocked (can be obtained during the quest)

children.name: Lockpick
children.display: Multiple lockpicks in case of failure, or a hair clip, or master thief's lockpick (tool belt works)

children.name: Either one (you may switch your gang):
children.display: Either one (you may switch your gang):

children.name: Black Arm Gang
children.display: Black Arm Gang members: black full helm, platebody and platelegs (plateskirt will not work; trimmed armour versions also do not work)

children.name: Phoenix Gang
children.display: Phoenix Gang members: 1,000 coins or ring of charos (a)

items.name: For completing the quest with a partner:
items.display: For completing the quest with a partner:

children.name: Black Arm Gang
children.display: Black Arm Gang members: black full helm, platebody and platelegs (plateskirt will not work)

children.name: Phoenix Gang
children.display: Phoenix Gang members: ranged or magic weapons

recommended.name: Burthorpe lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Burthorpe, Karamja, Taverley (or Catherby) and Varrock lodestones

recommended.name: Law altar teleport
recommended.display: Law altar teleport for faster access to Entrana

recommended.name: Dusty key
recommended.display: Dusty key (or level 70 Agility; can be obtained during quest; not required if fishing for lava eels in the Lava Maze) or a Mask of the Black Demon to teleport to Taverley Dungeon

kills: Grip (level 21) (only if completing the quest with a partner and only if part of the Phoenix Gang; does not fight back)
Jailer (level 39) (to obtain the dusty key, if required)
Ice Queen (level 77) (to obtain the ice gloves, if not already found)

rewards.name: Dragon battleaxe
rewards.display: Ability to wield the dragon battleaxe and dragon mace, and buy them, along with their off-hand variants, from the Happy Heroes' H'emporium shop in the guild

rewards.name: Scarface Pete's mansion
rewards.display: Access to Scarface Pete's mansion in Brimhaven (if you are in the Black Arm Gang)

rewards.name: Cap'n Arnav
rewards.display: Access to Cap'n Arnav's garden (if you are in the Phoenix Gang)

text.en: Talk to Achietties outside the Heroes' Guild in Burthorpe.
text.es: Habla con Achietties en las afueras del Heroes' Guild en Burthorpe.

text.en: fishing rod, fishing bait, harralander potion (unfinished)
text.es: caña de pescar, cebo de pesca, harralander potion (unfinished)

text.en: dusty key (may be on the keyring)
text.es: dusty key (puede estar en el keyring)

text.en: Talk to Gerrant, the fishing shop owner in Port Sarim, about lava eels. He will give you a vial of blamish snail slime.
text.es: Habla con Gerrant, el dueño de la tienda de pesca en Port Sarim, sobre las anguilas de lava. Te dará un vial de baba de blamish snail.

chatOptions: 1 I want to find out how to catch a lava eel.

text.en: Buy a fishing rod and fishing bait from Gerrant if you don't already have them.
text.es: Compra una caña de pescar y cebo de pesca a Gerrant si aún no los tienes.

text.en: Use the blamish snail slime on your harralander potion (unfinished).
text.es: Usa la baba de blamish snail en tu harralander potion (unfinished).

text.en: Use the blamish oil on your fishing rod.
text.es: Usa el blamish oil en tu caña de pescar.

text.en: Enter Taverley dungeon.
text.es: Entra en la Taverley dungeon.

text.en: If you already have a dusty key (a steel key ring with the dusty key works), or , skip the next step.
text.es: Si ya tienes una dusty key (una steel key ring con la dusty key sirve), o , sáltate el siguiente paso.

text.en: To obtain a dusty key:
text.es: Para obtener una dusty key:

text.en: Use the map (pictured right) to find Velrak the explorer. He is in the southern part of the dungeon.
text.es: Usa el mapa (imagen a la derecha) para encontrar a Velrak the explorer. Está en la parte sur de la mazmorra.

text.en: Kill the Jailer standing by the prison and use the key he drops to get into Velrak's cell.
text.es: Mata al Jailer que está junto a la prisión y usa la llave que suelta para entrar en la celda de Velrak.

text.en: Talk to him for the dusty key.
text.es: Habla con él para conseguir la dusty key.

chatOptions: 1 So..do you know anywhere good to explore?

text.en: Enter the area with the blue dragons, either by using your key on the locked door or by taking the Agility shortcut.
text.es: Entra en la zona con los blue dragons, ya sea usando tu llave en la puerta cerrada o tomando el atajo de Agilidad.

text.en: Run to the southernmost lava pool.
text.es: Corre hasta la charca de lava más al sur.

text.en: Catch a lava eel.
text.es: Captura una anguila de lava.

text.en: Cook the eel on a range or fire.
text.es: Cocina la anguila en un horno o fuego.

text.en: lockpick and 2 open inventory slots; 1,000 coins or a ring of charos (a) (if Phoenix Gang); black armour (if Black Arm Gang)
text.es: lockpick y 2 espacios de inventario libres; 1,000 coins o un ring of charos (a) (si Phoenix Gang); black armour (si Black Arm Gang)

text.en: Go to the Phoenix Gang Hideout in south-east Varrock, down the ladder into the hideout and talk to Straven, learning the gang password from him (Gherkin). Talk to him one more time.
text.es: Ve al Phoenix Gang Hideout en el sureste de Varrock, baja por la escalera hacia el escondite y habla con Straven, aprendiendo de él la contraseña de la banda (Gherkin). Habla con él una vez más.

text.en: Go to Brimhaven and talk to Alfonse the waiter in the food shop.
text.es: Ve a Brimhaven y habla con Alfonse the waiter en la tienda de comida.

text.en: Go through the door and talk to Charlie the cook.
text.es: Cruza la puerta y habla con Charlie the cook.

chatOptions: 2 I want to steal Scarface Pete's candlesticks.

text.en: Go to the mansion entrance to the west and talk to Garv. Bribe him with 1,000 coins, or free with a ring of charos (a).
text.es: Ve a la entrada de la mansión al oeste y habla con Garv. Sóbornalo con 1,000 coins, o gratis con un ring of charos (a).

text.en: Enter the front door near the guard.
text.es: Entra por la puerta principal cerca del guardia.

text.en: Go to the north-west part of the building and open the Treasure room door with a lockpick to enter.
text.es: Ve a la parte noroeste del edificio y abre la puerta de la Treasure room con un lockpick para entrar.

text.en: Open the northern chest.
text.es: Abre el cofre del norte.

text.en: Search the chest to take one candlestick.
text.es: Registra el cofre para coger un candlestick.

text.en: Bring the candlestick back to Straven to receive a Master Thief's Armband.
text.es: Lleva el candlestick de vuelta a Straven para recibir un Master Thief's Armband.

text.en: Go to south-west Varrock and talk to Katrine.
text.es: Ve al suroeste de Varrock y habla con Katrine.

chatOptions: 1 How can I get a master thief's armband?

text.en: Go to Brimhaven, to the building east of the bar and talk to Trobert.
text.es: Ve a Brimhaven, al edificio al este del bar y habla con Trobert.

chatOptions: 1 So can you help me get Scarface Pete's candlesticks?
1 I volunteer to undertake that mission!

text.en: Equip your Black armour.
text.es: Equípate tu Black armour.

text.en: Enter the large mansion in the north-west part of town.
text.es: Entra en la gran mansión en la parte noroeste de la ciudad.

text.en: Talk to Grip.
text.es: Habla con Grip.

chatOptions: 2 So what do my duties involve?

text.en: Go to the north-west part of the building and open the Treasure room door with a lockpick to enter.
text.es: Ve a la parte noroeste del edificio y abre la puerta de la Treasure room con un lockpick para entrar.

text.en: Open the northern chest.
text.es: Abre el cofre del norte.

text.en: Search the chest to take one candlestick.
text.es: Registra el cofre para coger un candlestick.

text.en: Bring the candlestick back to Katrine to receive a Master Thief's Armband.
text.es: Lleva el candlestick de vuelta a Katrine para recibir un Master Thief's Armband.

text.en: ice gloves, bank all items that cannot be taken to Entrana
text.es: ice gloves, guarda en el banco todos los objetos que no se puedan llevar a Entrana

text.en: If you do not have ice gloves:
text.es: Si no tienes ice gloves:

text.en: Equip combat gear and food to kill a level 77 Ice Queen.
text.es: Equípate equipo de combate y comida para matar a una Ice Queen de nivel 77.

text.en: Teleport to Taverley and climb to the top of the White Wolf Mountain and enter the cave.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a Taverley y sube hasta la cima de White Wolf Mountain y entra en la cueva.

text.en: Mine the rock slide to the east.
text.es: Extrae la rock slide al este.

text.en: Climb down the south ladder.
text.es: Baja por la escalera del sur.

text.en: Follow the tunnel south-west, then go up the ladder.
text.es: Sigue el túnel hacia el suroeste, luego sube por la escalera.

text.en: Make sure your compass is pointed north and take the east ladder down.
text.es: Asegúrate de que tu brújula apunte al norte y baja por la escalera del este.

text.en: Head north and follow the long tunnel all the way round, then use the ladder at the end.
text.es: Dirígete al norte y sigue el largo túnel hasta el final, luego usa la escalera al final.

text.en: Take the north ladder back down.
text.es: Baja de nuevo por la escalera del norte.

text.en: Run north and kill the queen for her gloves.
text.es: Corre al norte y mata a la reina para conseguir sus gloves.

text.en: Bank any equipment (has combat stats).
text.es: Guarda en el banco cualquier equipo (tiene estadísticas de combate).

text.en: Sail to Entrana or teleport to the law altar through the Abyss.
text.es: Navega hasta Entrana o teletranspórtate al law altar a través del Abyss.

text.en: Equip the ice gloves.
text.es: Equípate las ice gloves.

text.en: Kill the Firebird which is located on the northern part of the island, near the law altar, and take the Entranan firebird feather it drops.
text.es: Mata al Firebird que se encuentra en la parte norte de la isla, cerca del law altar, y coge la Entranan firebird feather que suelta.

text.en: Entranan firebird feather, lava eel, master thief's armband, at least 9 open inventory slots
text.es: Entranan firebird feather, anguila de lava, master thief's armband, al menos 9 espacios de inventario libres

text.en: Take the feather, eel, and armband to Achietties outside the Heroes' Guild.
text.es: Lleva la feather, la anguila y el armband a Achietties en las afueras del Heroes' Guild.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
